Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LearningObjectiveProgressReport.ReportCluster

The report top level report item that represents the top level learning objective (category or subject) with siblings. Contains summary information about assessment statuses for the cluster.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
ClusterId

Gets or sets the cluster identifier.

 integer

None.
Title

Gets or sets the title.

 string

None.
Description

Report cluster description.

 string

None.
ClusterSummary

A list of assessment status us entities representing summary information about the cluster. (e.g. how many Meets, Exceeds etc. assessment status items are there).

 Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LearningObjectiveProgressReport.AggregatedReportAssessmentStatus

None.
ClusterMasteryPercentage

The percentage of mastered learning objectives in the cluster (it is calculated as percentage from all assessed learning objectives in the cluster).

 decimal number

None.
Groups

The list of learning objective groups in the current cluster grouped by their parent.

 Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LearningObjectiveProgressReport.ReportGroup

None.
